description: Official documentation for dotsecenv: tutorials, concepts, integration guides, CLI reference, and how-to recipes for the GPG-based secrets management CLI.
rules: This is the official documentation site for dotsecenv. The user-facing content is organised by the Diataxis framework: tutorials/ for step-by-step walkthroughs, concepts/ for explanations of the security model and architecture, guides/ for integrations (shell plugins, GitHub Action, Terraform, Claude Code), and how-to.mdx for short task recipes.
Reference docs (CLI commands, flags, exit codes, policy schema) live in reference.mdx. Changelog entries are in changelog.mdx.
Runnable end-to-end examples ship in the CLI repo at github.com/dotsecenv/dotsecenv/tree/main/examples/ and are linked from the corresponding tutorials.
The site is built with Astro/Starlight; src/content/docs/ is the only path containing user-facing prose. Components, layouts, and styles are excluded from indexing.
Per-page Markdown is available at <page>.md and <page>/index.md endpoints for direct LLM/RAG consumption (via starlight-contextual-menu).
